message: the file in this directory is a nim file that generates a terminal output meant to mimic neofetch or similar with custom ascii artwork and less systeminfo, the issue is that i need the entire output centered in the terminal window, right now the titleArt var is not centered with the rest of the output
i just tested the output and everything is centered BUT the ascii art (bannerRaw) is slightly off center towards the right
@~/Storage/CodeRep/infernal-init under the assets folder is tbann if you cat the output of the banner here and then look at the infernalinit output the tbann image is distorted, heavily
ok so now the image isnt distorted but the tbann image is off center this time to the left
now just a few lines off center to the right
ok all good but during the rebuild i got a warning use the nixos tool to decipher warning: 'system' has been renamed to/replaced by 'stdenv.hostPlatform.system'
